overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a character exploring an alien settlement at dusk. The character walks through stone-paved streets, enters a workshop, traverses a garden courtyard with a fountain, and exits through a large gate to the outskirts. The environment features a mix of natural alien vegetation and historic stone architecture with warm artificial lighting.

segments.scene_description: Inside the workshop, the character walks past wooden shelves, workbenches, and hanging mechanical parts. The space is lit by warm artificial light. A person in a white robe stands near the back as the character approaches the exit doorway.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a garden courtyard featuring a central steaming fountain surrounded by purple flower beds. Stone benches line the paths as the character approaches a large ornate stone archway gate in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone gate into Myrrha Outskirts, transitioning from paved courtyard to dirt road. A wooden shack stands to the left while mountains rise in the background. The path continues forward into the wilderness area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the structured streets of an alien settlement into the open wilderness of the outskirts. It begins on a cobblestone street lined with adobe buildings, passing a stormtrooper and moving under a metal bridge toward a workshop entrance. As the camera enters the workshop, the environment shifts to a warm, artificially lit interior filled with mechanical parts and workbenches before proceeding toward a rear exit. The scene then opens into a garden courtyard featuring a steaming fountain and purple flower beds, with the camera gliding past stone benches toward a large ornate archway. Finally, the view transitions from the paved courtyard through the stone gate onto a dirt road, passing a wooden shack as the path leads toward distant mountains and the surrounding wilderness.
